data.title: Software Engineer
data.subtitle: Thinslices
description: Develop frontend features using TypeScript, React, and Next.js, supporting scalable solutions for enterprise and consumer applications.
Automate CI/CD pipelines to boost release velocity and improve developer experience.
Scale backend infrastructure using Node.js and AWS services (Lambda, Step Functions, S3, SES) to support growing product needs.
Utilize Storybook to document and develop UI components, enhancing design consistency and reusability.
Mentor junior developers through pair programming and reviews; translate engineering work into business value during demos.

data.title: Freelance Software Engineer
description: Lead a monorepo migration for a large-scale consumer platform, accelerating CI/CD performance and reducing code redundancy across multiple teams.
Implement a flexible monthly meal credit system used by 6K+ diners and adopted by 250+ corporate clients, driving $200K+ in spend and managing $18M in credits within 90 days post-launch.
Remediate critical CVEs in key infrastructure dependencies, significantly improving system-wide security posture.
Enhance operational observability by defining SLOs, setting burn alerts, and building actionable dashboards with improved telemetry.
Unify code quality standards across engineering teams by standardizing ESLint configurations and linting practices.
Improve release stability by implementing comprehensive end-to-end test coverage and refactoring legacy code based on modern UX/UI standards.
Deliver urgent production fixes with rapid turnaround in high-pressure environments, supporting B2B clients with minimal oversight.

data.title: Frontend Engineer
data.subtitle: Endava
description: Built responsive and testable interfaces using React, Jest, and Enzyme to meet design and QA requirements.
Integrated WebSocket support to enable real-time data updates and improve UX.
Developed a full-stack demo platform independently, demonstrating initiative and technical range.
Conducted interviews for JavaScript interns, supporting technical hiring and company growth.
